title: Biological chip systems
abstract: A biological chip system is provided in which execution, cleaning, scanning, and/or drying are all integrated and automated. The system employs an execution system (140), a first mobile structure (300), a second mobile structure (310), a third mobile structure (320), at least two fluid paths, a fluid control system (130), a cleaning device (120), a biochip scanning system (110), and/or a computer control system (100). The computer control system (100) processes co-ordination among the biochip scanning system (110), the cleaning device (120), the fluid control system (130), and/or the execution system (140).
claims:
Claims CLAIMS: 1 . A biological chip system, comprising: a system chassis that further includes: an execution system defining a horizontal co-ordinate, a vertical co-ordinate, and a co-ordinate perpendicular to the horizontal co-ordinate and the vertical co-ordinate, wherein the execution system includes a biochip microarray, which comprises an underlying substance with a probe and a plate having at least two through hollow places, further wherein a hybridization area is formed between the underlying substance and the plate; a first mobile structure movable along the horizontal co-ordinate; a second mobile structure movable along the vertical co-ordinate; a third mobile structure movable along the co-ordinate perpendicular to the horizontal co-ordinate and the vertical co-ordinate; at least two fluid paths connected to the hybridization area through said two through hollow places, respectively; a fluid control system connected to the hybridization area through said 

 two through hollow places, respectively; a cleaning device attached to the first mobile structure; a biochip scanning system attached to the third mobile structure; and a computer control system for processing co-ordination among the biochip scanning system, the cleaning device, the fluid control system, and the execution system. The system of claim 1 , wherein the fluid control system further comprises: at least one gas provider for providing gas pressure; one fluid regulator for controlling the entrance of the fluid; and a fluid provider connected to the fluid path through the fluid regulator, wherein the gas provider and the fluid regulator are placed on the second mobile structure and the third mobile structure. The system of claim 1 , wherein the probe of the biochip microarray includes a 

 molecule that contains coded instructions. 4. The system of claim 1 , wherein the material for the plate of the biochip microarray includes silicon polymers. 5. The system of claim 1 , wherein the material for the underlying substance of the biochip microarray is glass, silicon, or high molecular polymer. 6. The system of claim 1 , wherein the system further comprises a temperature control system. 7. The system of claim 6, wherein the temperature control system comprises a hot plate, a heating body, a cooling body, a temperature sensor, and a temperature controller. 8. The system of claim 7, wherein the material composing the hot plate is meta alloy, or a non-metallic material with a high coefficient of heat conductivity. 9. The system of claim 8, wherein the non-metallic material is glass. 10. The system of claim 8, wherein the non-metallic material is silicon.
